hooks.command: /usr/bin/python3 ~/.codex/hooks/record_interaction.py -o interaction-history.md --state-file .interaction-recorder-state.json --title "Codex Interaction History" --topic "自动记录 Codex 用户与 Agent 的主题相关交互" --user-name "我" --agent-name "Codex" --source "codex-tool-hook" --quiet
